retrieved_result: Travel Directions Home» About» Directions E-Notify Travel Directions DIRECTIONS TO TOWNSHIP OF BRANCHBURG MUNICIPAL COMPLEXTo program a GPS, please use 590 Old York Road which is the police station address. The Municipal Building is located directly behind the Police Station. From the North South on Garden State Park
